title: lappula spinocarpos subsp. spinocarpos
intro: Lappula spinocarpos subsp. spinocarpos, a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region, is a member of the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Lappula spinocarpos subsp. spinocarpos include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lappula spinocarpos subsp. spinocarpos are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to address various health concerns.
